title: GrantApplication
description: A Cultural Development Fund (CDF) grant application submitted by a cultural organization to DCLA — the everyday transaction of DCLA's constituency. NET-NEW: there is NO public API and NO Open Data twin for the application itself; today organizations create and track applications only inside the DCLA Grants Management System (dclagms.nyc.gov), a Salesforce Experience Cloud portal reached by login. Open Data publishes the AWARD outcome (see program-funding.json) but never the application pipeline. This schema serves both the read surface (list/get an organization's own applications) and the write surface (apply for a grant).

applicationId.description: Server-assigned application number (DCLA GMS / Salesforce record id). Omit on create; returned on the created resource.

status.description: Lifecycle status. Set by DCLA, not the applicant.

projectTitle.description: Title of the proposed project / program.

projectDescription.description: Narrative description of the cultural program for which funding is requested.

requestedAmount.description: Amount of funding requested, in dollars.

councilDistrict.description: Primary NYC Council district served by the project.
